gist.headline: Fresh coat of paint
gist.blurb: The community just shipped House Painter! Now you can visualize exterior color schemes for your home before committing to that neon pink trim.
gist.summary: Added the community-built House Painter app to the project showcase, which uses the image API to visualize exterior home color schemes.
gist.impact: Users can now discover House Painter in the gallery to easily test out new home aesthetics using AI image generation.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret and holding a paintbrush, painting a cozy pixel art house. A chunky robot companion holding up a color swatch palette.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, holding a paintbrush and painting a small pixelated house. A chunky robot companion with a CRT monitor head holds up a color swatch palette. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.
